name: Shortcut Chicken Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, melt margarine.
2. Add flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Gradually stir in broth and milk.
4. Cook until the gravy boils and thickens, stirring constantly. Makes about 2 cups gravy.
SHORTCUT BEEF GRAVY: Prepare Shortcut Chicken Gravy as directed, except substitute 1 can (10 1/2 oz) condensed Beef Broth for the chicken broth.
